# Neodymium Intelligence

Neodymium Intelligence is a premier institutional data and news dashboard focused on Future Tech and Defense. We provide predictive analysis, strategic intelligence reports, and real-time synthesis of geopolitical shifts, defense tech, and institutional strategy.

## Key Focus Areas
- Defense Technology & Industrial Base
- Artificial Intelligence & Autonomy
- Geopolitics & Global Security
- Space Economy
- Cyber Security & Advanced Computing

## About Our Intelligence Reports
Our reports provide deep technical analysis, strategic impact assessments, and executive summaries of critical defense and tech news. All reports are published at https://neodymium.world/
